My Edge

Senior Director, NICE

AI-driven engineering leader with over 27 years designing, building, and delivering software products.

Deep experience operationalizing AI on multi-tenant cloud (Azure/AWS) with governance, observability, and cost optimization. Led product development across consumer, platform, and enterprise software, applying AI to improve forecasting, quality, and productivity across Customer Experience, Education, Banking & Finance, and more.

Enterprise Agile evangelist who has led multi-team transformations at scale, institutionalizing continuous improvement to accelerate throughput and quality.

Professional Journey

Education

  • MBA (Systems & Marketing) - Indore University, 1998
  • Bachelor of Science - Indore University, 1995
  • Hons. Dip in System Mang. - NIIT Indore, 1997

Key Skills

AI Implementation Cloud (Azure/AWS) R&D Leadership Agile Transformation Product Strategy Enterprise Software Team Scaling
OUR APPROACH

We believe that strategy should do more than sit on paper — it should drive measurable change.

Understand

01

We immerse ourselves in your business to uncover challenges and opportunities.

Strategize

02

We design tailored strategies that align with your goals and available resources.

Implement

03

We translate strategy into action, driving execution across teams with clear ownership and focus.

Measure

04

We establish data-driven feedback loops to monitor KPIs and ensure the strategy delivers tangible impact.

TESTIMONIALS

Words That Matter

"Dinesh is one of those rare managers who also naturally serves as an inspiring mentor for the whole staff."
Rajesh Dankh Infra Architect
"Always willing to share his knowledge and create the environment light and positive, good for productivity."
Rommel Sharma AI & Enterprise Transformation Leader
"He encourages team members to give their 100%... and appreciates good work."
Seema Kamble Nadkarni Flutter Developer
"He sets goals for the team, has a vision for the future, and displays confidence in all that the team does."

"He generates a lot of energy in the team and makes everyone involved with the organization."

Our Offerings

Programs designed to elevate leadership and execution.

Leadership Collaboration

Peer to Peer Coaching

Facilitated coaching circles where leaders learn from shared experiences and collective wisdom. Build trust-based networks that accelerate growth.

View Program ↗
Team Dynamics Growth

Group Coaching

Structured group sessions designed to align teams and accelerate collective performance. Harness the power of diverse perspectives.

View Program ↗
C-Suite Strategy

Executive Coaching

One-on-one strategic partnership to elevate your leadership impact and vision. Tailored guidance for C-suite and senior leaders.

View Program ↗
Enterprise Culture

Corporate Coaching

Large-scale coaching programs to drive organizational transformation and agility. Build a coaching culture across your enterprise.

View Program ↗
